title: Test after auth
description: As a developer, I want to run automated tests after user authentication so that I can verify the system behaves correctly for authenticated users.

acceptanceTests.description: Given a user is authenticated, when tests are executed, then all authentication-dependent features should be verified
Given test suite runs post-authentication, when accessing protected endpoints, then proper authorization should be validated

tasks.description: Set up test environment with authenticated user context
Create test cases for protected functionality
